lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Alyssa
lines.text: Hello, if you've something important to tell me, be out with it! I'm a busy woman.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just making small talk.

lines.speaker: Alyssa
lines.text: How very nice of you. However, I'm sure there are less busy people who'd love to chat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, okay.

lines.speaker: Alyssa
lines.text: Chin up love and go adventure, that's what you lot do right?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose we do, bye!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Alyssa
lines.text: I'm Alyssa the housekeeper and this castle needs constant attention! I've enough trouble with the guards messing up my carpets without you adding to the problem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm, yeah sorry about that. Speaking of carpets, ever thought how strange that there are carpets beneath the stairs?

lines.speaker: Alyssa
lines.text: It's cut to fit! If I had a gold piece for everytime I was asked that question!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure... Cut to fit... Not an oversight at all.

lines.speaker: Alyssa
lines.text: Alright, believe what you like. I've a castle to clean.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you the Alyssa this entry mentions?

lines.speaker: Alyssa
lines.text: Ah, I suppose I am.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got anything to say about it?

lines.speaker: Alyssa
lines.text: Why should I tell you anything? There are private matters of a late royal family! It wouldn't be proper to divulge such information to an adventurer like you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...Most people don't know when to stop sharing. I guess you have a point though.

lines.speaker: Alyssa
lines.text: Yes, I do indeed. Off with you, I've had my fair share of nosy adventurers for one day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alright, sorry for disturbing you. Bye.

lines.speaker: Alyssa
lines.text: Bye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...Most people don't know when to stop sharing. It's probably worth mentioning that I've found all entries of this memoir.

lines.speaker: Alyssa
lines.text: Yes, how did you come across this? I'm fairly certain it was destroyed... At least, I recall seeing a man removing the pages...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Honestly, I've never really questioned it. I do things for people and they give me things.

lines.speaker: Alyssa
lines.text: Well, I suppose if you've already nosily rifled through the princesses personal memoirs, I can tell you a little more.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fantastic! I've got to say, there's some great little gems in this old book. I think I'm unravelling a great mystery!

lines.speaker: Alyssa
lines.text: Well, if I were you I'd keep shush on the whole matter.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How come?

lines.speaker: Alyssa
lines.text: You must be new here. When the king died, everyone assumed the princess would take the throne when she came of age.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But the council kept control...

lines.speaker: Alyssa
lines.text: Indeed, and poor young Rose was shipped off and labelled as crazy.

lines.speaker: Alyssa
lines.text: I do very much miss her, but one can't change the past.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What if I were to say she's still out there! Read this entry that I found hidden within a secret part of the memoir.

lines.speaker: Alyssa
lines.text: I'm sorry adventurer, but what does this prove exactly? For all you know someone else wrote this to mislead you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, you do make a good point...

lines.speaker: Alyssa
lines.text: If she did write this I'm afraid to say she must be mad after all.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What makes you say that?

lines.speaker: Alyssa
lines.text: Are all adventurers as dense as you? If you were in danger, do you really think leaving a hidden message in an old lost book for any stranger to pick up is the best way to get help?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's certainly peculiar, but it should be investigated regardless. Y'know, just in case...

lines.speaker: Alyssa
lines.text: Alright, spring the trap! Don't come crying to me when it all turns sour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't you worry! I'm a brave adventurer with a damsel in distress to rescue! This is my bread and butter.

lines.speaker: Alyssa
lines.text: Yes, yes, of course. Well, I'd be glad to hear of her being safe but perhaps you should heed the warning.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Which warning?

lines.speaker: Alyssa
lines.text: Tread carefully.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, of course! Thanks for chatting with me Alyssa, I'll see you around.

lines.speaker: Alyssa
lines.text: Farewell.

sections.title: Using any other item besides Kharedst's memoirs on her

lines.speaker: Alyssa
lines.text: I'm sorry, but I'm not paid to serve every lazy adventurer who walks their dirty feet through my halls!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I'll be going.
